title: youtube poop: pumba visits his cd-i friends
description:
pumba has a bad day and weegee forsaw this

as far as I can see only one other youtube poop has been made of the timon and pumba series (not the lion king)

clips used:
timon and pumba ( stand by me )

some hotel mario, faces of evil and wand of gamelon sounds and pictures
